headline: Costco Tariff Refund Lawsuit Tests Member Value And Investor Risk
summary: Costco Wholesale, NasdaqGS:COST, is facing a proposed nationwide class action lawsuit over how it handles refunds tied to now-invalidated import tariffs. Plaintiffs are seeking direct cash reimbursement for shoppers who paid higher prices during the tariff period, rather than indirect relief through lower future prices. The case follows a Supreme Court decision striking down certain tariffs and raises wider questions about how large retailers return government tariff refunds to...

headline: Gulf Worries Worsen | Heard on Street Thursday Recap
summary: Iran attacked more ships and its new supreme leader vowed to fight on.  Brent crude jumped more than 9%, its largest one-day increase since 2020, after President Trump said stopping Iran's nuclear efforts was a higher priority than oil prices.  The Dow industrials, S&P 500 and Nasdaq composite all lost more than 1.5%.

content.title: Gulf Worries Worsen | Heard on Street Thursday Recap
content.summary: Iran attacked more ships and its new supreme leader vowed to fight on.  Brent crude jumped more than 9%, its largest one-day increase since 2020, after President Trump said stopping Iran's nuclear efforts was a higher priority than oil prices.  The Dow industrials, S&P 500 and Nasdaq composite all lost more than 1.5%.

headline: Hiboy C1 E-Bike Lands at Costco Stores

headline: How $200 Oil Impacts Your Stocks and Your Wallet
summary: Oil is sitting at $96 a barrel as of March 13, 2026, up from $71 just ten days ago. headline: How Costco’s Tariff-Refund Lawsuit and Membership-Fee Strength May Impact Costco Wholesale (COST) Investors
summary: In early March 2026, Costco Wholesale reported strong quarterly sales and membership-fee growth while also becoming the focus of a proposed nationwide class-action lawsuit seeking to force the retailer to return any refunds from now-invalidated Trump-era tariffs directly to customers. The combination of robust operating momentum and legal scrutiny over how potential tariff refunds are shared with members puts Costco’s core pledge of value and low prices under closer examination. Next, we’ll...

headline: Rising gas prices could offset any tax refunds for US consumers
summary: US consumers may be in for a surprise as the Iran war stirs up price shocks for oil (CL=F, BZ=F) and gas (RB=F), ultimately limiting Americans' spending power for discretionary purchases and offsetting the benefits of tax refunds. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma comes on Market Domination to outline the impact of added geopolitical pressures on consumers. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

headline: Americans are demanding refunds from the $180 billion in tariffs they paid for, and they’re suing companies like Costco to make it happen
